title: Twilight Forest Boss Recipes
description: This mod adds ways to respawn bosses from the Twilight Forest.
body:
Twilight Forest Boss Recipes is a mod for Fabric 1.19.2 (Fabric API is required) that adds ways to summon the Twilight Forest bosses back.

 

It costs 5 levels for the Naga Essence, 7 levels for the Lich Essence, 10 levels for the Alpha Yeti, Phantom Knights, and Minoshroom, and 12 levels for the Snow Queen, Hydra, and Ur-Ghast.

 

Required mods:

Fabric API 1.19.2

Twilight Forest 1.19.2
